item.title: The 532nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 22 - TRANS TUESDAY
item.description:
I LIED! MORE PRIDE MEEMAYS!!! I hereby Declare that July is PRIDE MONTH 2: ECLECTIC SUBARU!
I don't have enough for another full month of Pride MeeMays, unfortunately. They will be interspersed with other MeeMays.
Let's not tell them...
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.me/transparents
As a Dragon, ALL Pride Flags should have a Dragon on therm.
I don't know what happened to the crop on this one
EXTERMINATE FASCISTS
Abbii, Ellie, Potato, Me
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: "These Rainbow Swirls Are Ocean Currents!"
item.description: "Ocean currents move water, heat, carbon and nutrients around the globe, influencing Earth's weather patterns, ecosystems, climate, fisheries, and more. In this visualization, warmer currents are yellow and orange, while colder currents are purple or dark blue. The data comes from NASA'S ECCO, a detailed model of Earth's ocean that incorporates hundreds of millions of observations from satellites and floating ocean sensors." –NASA Earth. #geography #ocean #awesome #nature #the_more_you_know
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1399 (you just got saltmarshed)
item.description:
Yes. Let's get this bread.
I wonder what the Carboniferous forests smelled like.
Tomorrow is my 41st birthday. I have. Thoughts. None of them great. Meh.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin. Hey Pippin. [Indecipherable whisper] I love you too!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: What Happened Today #151
item.description: Trump’s packing his financial agenda into one colossal bill to reshape America while crushing anyone who won’t fall in line. He’s driven two GOP lawmakers to retire rather than back his plan, turning their exits into no votes, and publicly attacked AT&T twice just as they became his business rival. This is presidential power as personal weaponry. We can’t let him bulldoze democracy to serve his wallet and his revenge. Don’t rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what’s going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/sanction-companies-cuba-military 2. https://go.govbrief.today/ceqa-reforms-budgetyes 3. https://go.govbrief.today/satellite-cutoff-delayed 4. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-declaration-dissent 5. https://go.govbrief.today/dollar-index-52-years 6. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-open-letter-powell 7. https://go.govbrief.today/house-gop-6-no-votes 8. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sues-la-sanctuary 9. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garcia-release-delayed-weeks 10. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-asks-deport-babies 11. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-increases-advance-notice 12. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-detention-camp-merch 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-freezes-billions-education 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-harvard-civil-rights 15. https://go.govbrief.today/bush-obama-usaid 16. https://go.govbrief.today/va-lawmakers-nsf-location 17. https://go.govbrief.today/bacon-retiring-2026 18. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-cbs-settlement-talks 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-attacks-forbes 20. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-skims-contributions 21. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-appeals-perkins-coie 22. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-att-service Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/usip-reverts-to-trump Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/gop-senate-donors Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com *** Imgur Reminder - I have no chat access here. :( *** I'm getting a GovBrief email. To the person who messaged me, I could see your message, but not respond. Listen, we all have strengths. In your case, go to https://resist.bot. Send a postcard or a fax or just an email. The simple act of creating accountability for your officials empowers you to do more over time. It really works. Heck, sure GovBrief to people who might be receptive. This is the way I fight back. I'll be sure to post the new GovBrief email here.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: Samoela

item.description: A compound found in cannabis could protect one of the world’s most dangerous fungal pathogens. Cryptococcus neoformans causes life-threatening meningitis. In lab tests, researchers found that two cannabis compounds—cannabidiol (or CBD) and cannabidivarin (or CBDV)—killed the fungus more effectively than commonly used antifungal drugs. The compounds also worked on common fungi that cause skin infections like jock itch and athlete’s foot. The researchers tested the treatment on wax moth larvae, which have an immune system similar to ours. Larvae treated with CBD survived at higher rates than those given a standard antifungal drug, and almost as well as uninfected larvae. The cannabis compounds appear to work by damaging the fungus’s cell membranes and disrupting its energy production. This study shows that CBD might be a powerful treatment for skin infections, and possibly more, if further research confirms its safety and effectiveness in humans. CBD is also knowns for its anti-inflammatory, anti-anxiety, and neuroprotective properties. It's already approved in some countries as a treatment for rare forms of epilepsy, such as Dravet syndrome, where it helps reduce the frequency and severity of seizures. Studies also suggest it may ease symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and chronic pain, and may support recovery from conditions involving inflammation, like arthritis or multiple sclerosis. Unlike THC, CBD does not cause a high, which makes it more suitable for daily or long-term medical use. learn more https://www.ndtv.com/science/cannabis-compounds-show-potential-against-deadly-fungal-pathogen-in-lab-studies-8587390

item.title: remembering this young hero
item.description:
Peter Wang was an American Army Junior Reserve Officers Training Corps (AJROTC) cadet and high school student. He was born in Brooklyn, New York, and raised in Broward County, Florida. He's supposed to be 22 years old today.
(Peter with friends) But he was killed at age 15. He was among the 17 victims in the 2018 mass shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. February 14, 2018, the deadliest mass shooting at a high school in U.S. history.
At the time Peter was in study hall, passing time over a chessboard. As panic spread through the corridors, he acted quickly. He helped students escape the gunfire by holding an exit door open in a third-floor hallway, pushing the students out while under fire. He was wearing his JROTC uniform. This act of bravery, allowing others to flee to safety ahead of himself amidst the chaos, ultimately cost him his life as he was shot multiple times.
For his bravery, Peter was honored with the highest recognition from the United States Department of the Army — the ROTC Medal for Heroism. He was also honored with a military funeral. Junior ROTC cadets from Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School and other South Florida schools were there to salute in uniform, joined by military veterans and local residents. Two other victims, Alaina Petty and Martin Duque, were also in the JROTC.
(his family) Peter was posthumously accepted to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point on Tuesday "for his heroic actions on Feb. 14, 2018." From a statement: “West Point has given posthumous offers of admission in very rare instances for those candidates or potential candidate’s (sic) whose actions exemplified the tenets of Duty, Honor and Country.”
He would have been in the Class of 2025. This year's West Point class of 2025 includes honorary member Peter Wang.
All the victims from that day all should be alive and thriving today. Alyssa Alhadeff, 14 Scott Beigel, 35 Martin Duque, 14 Nicholas Dworet, 17 Aaron Feis, 37 Jaime Guttenberg, 14 Chris Hixon, 49 Luke Hoyer, 15 Cara Loughran, 14 Gina Montalto, 14 Joaquin Oliver, 17 Alaina Petty, 14 Meadow Pollack, 18 Helena Ramsay, 17 Alex Schachter, 14 Carmen Schentrup, 16 Peter Wang, 15
item.dc:creator: trojanbarfare

item.title: To infinity and beyond.
item.dc:creator: Headcase444

item.title: Happy Canada Day !
item.description:
Happy Canada Day !!
Enjoy a few pictures of my beautiful country.
British Columbia.
Alberta.
Saskatchewan.
Manitoba.
Ontario.
Québec.
New Brunswick.
Nova Scotia.
Prince Edward Island.
Newfoundland.
Torngat Mountains, Labrador.
Yukon.
Northwest Territories.
Nunavut.
And now a few pictures I took myself over the years, here and there, but mostly on the East side.
Canada, eh.
Mount Robson, British Columbia.
Le Brion, shipwreck in Kegaska QC.
Half a tractor, this is because I went to the wrong address for a delivery, and I saw this.
Somewhere on QC 138.
Home.
Moonbeam, Ontario.
Somewhere.
Manitoba, probably.
At work.
Gaspesian Peninsula.
Miscou Island, New Brunswick.
Home.
Somewhere.
Hermitage, Newfoundland.
Sand Cove, New Brunswick.
Home.
Toronto, without a Stanley Cup since 1967.
Pokemouche, New Brunswick.
Manicouagan Reservoir, Québec.
Dildo, Newfoundland.
Home.
Wemindji, James Bay, Québec.
Tumilik, the Inuit girl.
I took this photo on May 1st, 2023, at 7:32 PM, just two minutes after Gordon Lightfoot passed away. The sky opened with this full rainbow, and the world fell silent for a moment. It felt like a farewell.
item.dc:creator: leifericson793
